description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & Validate OPML file that runs on every push and pull request. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository with recursive submodules, sets up Python 3.12, installs dependencies, builds an OPML file using a script, validates it with another script, and uploads the site as a Pages artifact if the branch is master. Additionally, deploy the artifact to GitHub Pages if the branch is master, requiring the build job to complete successfully.
